The Story

Web3's Most
Valuable Contributor

PARELLA™ — formerly known as Web3righteousness — is a powerhouse creator, strategist and founder operating at the intersection of Web3, AI and the creator economy.

From building communities of thousands to founding four active Web3 ventures, PARELLA has spent years influencing the future of AI & Web3 — one thread, one strategy, one community at a time.

An Africa Talent Scouter for Web3 projects, she bridges the gap between African creators and global Web3 opportunities.

Content CreatorGrowth StrategistBrand BuilderGhostwriterAfrica Talent ScoutCommunity FounderWeb3 EducatorAI Enthusiast

What I Offer

Services built for
Web3 growth

Whether you're a project, a founder, or a creator — PARELLA™ has the strategy, voice and network to move you forward.

✍️
Content Creation

High-impact threads, posts and narratives crafted for X and beyond. Content that educates, entertains and converts.

  • Viral thread writing
  • X/Twitter content strategy
  • Long-form educational content
  • Multi-platform adaptation
📈
Web3 Growth Strategy

Battle-tested growth frameworks from 0 to 70K+ followers. Algorithm decoded. Audience built with intention.

  • X algorithm optimisation
  • Audience growth roadmap
  • Engagement rate improvement
  • Niche positioning strategy
🎯
Brand Strategy

Full brand identity and positioning for Web3 projects and creators. From concept to community-ready brand.

  • Brand voice & identity
  • Web3 project positioning
  • Community brand building
  • Visual narrative direction
👻
Ghostwriting

Your voice. My words. Premium Web3 ghostwriting for founders, KOLs and projects who need to show up consistently.

  • Thread ghostwriting
  • Newsletter ghostwriting
  • Article & long-form content
  • Web3 niche expertise
🌐
Community Building

From zero to loyal community. Spaces, Telegram, Discord — building the ecosystems that keep Web3 projects alive.

  • Community architecture
  • X Spaces hosting & strategy
  • Telegram group management
  • Community retention systems
🔮
1:1 Consulting

Book a private session with PARELLA™. Get personalised strategy, feedback and a clear roadmap for your Web3 goals.

  • 60-min strategy session

What She Creates

Content that moves
the Web3 space

From algorithm breakdowns to monetisation strategies — PARELLA's content is the blueprint thousands of Web3 creators follow.

01
X Algorithm Mastery

Breaking down the X algorithm — Tweepcred scores, interest-based feeds, shadow bans, and how to beat the system as a Web3 creator.

02
Web3 Monetisation

How to earn $500–$3,000/month in Web3 — ghostwriting, airdrops, jobs, ambassador roles and digital income streams.

03
AI × Web3

The intersection of artificial intelligence and Web3 — how to use AI tools to build faster, grow smarter and earn more.

04
Creator Economy

Building a personal brand, growing an audience from zero and turning followers into income — Web3 edition.

05
Airdrop Intelligence

Staying ahead of airdrop opportunities, farming strategies and how to identify legitimate projects from noise.

06
Viral Content Science

What makes content go viral on X — real data, real examples and the patterns behind 160K+ view posts.
